articles.title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal ‘slush funds’ tied to classified programs
articles.summary: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch on Tuesday suggested the White House should investigate billions of dollars he suggested are being funneled to secret programs operated by the federal government. Grusch, a former intelligence officer who gave NewsNation his first on-the-record interview as a whistleblower in 2023, before testifying to Congress, claimed there are massive “slush funds” tied to UFO programs, including allegedly classified UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives largely shielded from Congress and the public. articles.title: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026
articles.summary: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026 Steven Spielberg's 1977 classic tapped into anxieties about the US government hiding UFO information from the public. When trailers for Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day confirmed that it deals with extraterrestrials, the internet exploded with speculation that it was a sequel to his 1977 classic, Close Encounters of the Third Kind. The guesswork became so rampant that the press notes for the new film cheekily announce it is "not a sequel to Close Encounters (sorry, internet)". Emily Blunt, one of Disclosure Day's stars, has described it as resembling "a third act" along with Close Encounters and ET The Extra-Terrestrial (1982).

articles.title: Multiple Pastors Claim U.S. Military Intelligence Officers Secretly Briefed Them To Prepare Their Congregations For UAP Disclosure
articles.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claims the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in highly classified military programs, citing crash‑retrieval operations that operate beyond elected officials' oversight. He says sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and deeply compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some data remains inaccessible even to senior officials. Alberino discussed recent UAP file releases from the Trump administration, describing them as underwhelming and predicting more significant material could appear later. He referenced eyewitness accounts of gray aliens, dismembered bodies, and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch's 2023 testimony that the U.S. recovered non‑human biologics, though no independent verification exists. Scientists and mainstream researchers note that no publicly available physical evidence confirms extraterrestrial life or recovered alien technology, and the Pentagon maintains that All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office investigations have not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity. Lawmakers such as Representative Tim Burchett and Representative Anna Paulina Luna have called for greater transparency and whistleblower protections amid ongoing congressional interest in UAP investigations.

en.title: Multiple Pastors Claim U.S. Military Intelligence Officers Secretly Briefed Them To Prepare Their Congregations For UAP Disclosure
en.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claims the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in highly classified military programs, citing crash‑retrieval operations that operate beyond elected officials' oversight. He says sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and deeply compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some data remains inaccessible even to senior officials.

de.title: Mehrere Pastoren behaupten, US-Militärgeheimdienstoffiziere hätten sie heimlich informiert, um ihre Gemeinden auf die UAP-Offenlegung vorzubereiten
de.summary: Der investigative Autor Timothy Alberino behauptet, die US-Regierung habe außerirdische Leichen geborgen und sie in streng geheimen Militärprogrammen versteckt, und verweist auf Bergungsoperationen, die außerhalb der Kontrolle gewählter Amtsträger stattfinden. Er sagt, dass vertrauliche UAP-Informationen von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert werden und dass einige Daten selbst für hochrangige Beamte unzugänglich bleiben.

articles.title: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch Says Pentagon Insiders Are Too Afraid to Talk
articles.summary: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch PENTAGON KNOWS MORE ABOUT UFOs THAN IT'S LETTING ON The government's biggest UFO whistleblower says there are a bunch of folks who know what's going on behind closed doors . and asked him if people inside the Pentagon are afraid to speak out about UFOs and extraterrestrials. David says the fallout from his own whistleblower experience has had a chilling effect on current and former federal employees . and David became one of the most prominent figures in UFO conspiracy circles after claiming the government was hiding information about alleged non-human craft . Jacob also asked David whether greater transparency around UFOs might come with unintended consequences .

articles.title: Did Brazilian influencer Mayk Leão really capture a UFO over his rural farm in Campo Largo? Here's what we know
articles.summary: Markdown Content: Digital content producer Mayk Leão, widely recognized on virtual platforms for his work dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals at risk, surprised his followers by changing the focus of his publications. Acostumado documenting his wildlife care routine, the influencer used his profiles to report an unusual experience on his rural property. The episode occurred on a site located in the municipality of Campo Largo, which is part of Região Metropolitana of Curitiba, in the state of Paraná. The change of agenda happened after the video recording of a supposed unidentified flying object crossing the sky in the region.

en.title: Did Brazilian influencer Mayk Leão really capture a UFO over his rural farm in Campo Largo? Here's what we know
en.summary: Markdown Content: Digital content producer Mayk Leão, widely recognized on virtual platforms for his work dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals at risk, surprised his followers by changing the focus of his publications. Acostumado documenting his wildlife care routine, the influencer used his profiles to report an unusual experience on his rural property. The episode occurred on a site located in the municipality of Campo Largo, which is part of Região Metropolitana of Curitiba, in the state of Paraná.

de.title: Hat der brasilianische Influencer Mayk Leão wirklich ein UFO über seiner ländlichen Farm in Campo Largo eingefangen? Das wissen wir
de.summary: Markdown-Inhalte: Mayk Leão, Produzent digitaler Inhalte, der auf virtuellen Plattformen weithin für seine Arbeit zur Rettung und Rehabilitation gefährdeter Tiere bekannt ist, überraschte seine Anhänger, indem er den Schwerpunkt seiner Veröffentlichungen änderte. Als Acostumado dokumentierte der Influencer seine Routine bei der Tierpflege und nutzte seine Profile, um über ein ungewöhnliches Erlebnis auf seinem Landgrundstück zu berichten. Der Vorfall ereignete sich an einem Ort in der Gemeinde Campo Largo, die zur Região Metropolitana Curitiba im Bundesstaat Paraná gehört.

articles.title: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action
articles.summary: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action - USA Herald David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action On Tuesday, June 9 at 1:00 p. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, bipartisan lawmakers, whistleblowers, journalists, and filmmakers are expected to gather on the steps of the U. The event is being framed as a direct call for declassification, stronger whistleblower protections, and passage of disclosure-related legislation. Grusch, the former intelligence officer who previously testified under oath before Congress, is expected to discuss non-human intelligence-related evidence he says he encountered through classified channels.

articles.title: Influencer reports alleged UFO sighting in Paraná, goes viral with millions of views, and says he lives between fascination and fear after mysterious phenomenon
articles.summary: Lights recorded in the rural area of Campo Largo, unusual sounds in the forest, and an object observed for dozens of minutes transformed the routine of a content creator and mobilized specialists, curious people, and researchers of aerial phenomena A supposed UFO sighting in the rural area of Campo Largo, in the Metropolitan Region of Curitiba, transformed the life of digital influencer Mayk Leão, 31, in recent days. The case, recorded on the night of May 31, 2026, gained national attention after videos posted on social media accumulated millions of views and sparked debates about the possibility of an unusual aerial phenomenon.

de.title: Influencer meldet angebliche UFO-Sichtung in Paraná, wird millionenfach viral und sagt, er lebe zwischen Faszination und Angst nach einem mysteriösen Phänomen
de.summary: In der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo aufgenommene Lichter, ungewöhnliche Geräusche im Wald und ein Dutzende Minuten lang beobachtetes Objekt veränderten die Routine eines Content-Erstellers und mobilisierten Spezialisten, Neugierige und Forscher von Luftphänomenen. Eine angebliche UFO-Sichtung in der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo in der Metropolregion Curitiba veränderte in den letzten Tagen das Leben der digitalen Influencerin Mayk Leão, 31. Der in der Nacht des 31. Mai 2026 aufgezeichnete Fall erlangte landesweite Aufmerksamkeit, nachdem in den sozialen Medien veröffentlichte Videos millionenfach angeklickt wurden und Debatten über die Möglichkeit eines ungewöhnlichen Luftphänomens auslösten.

articles.title: Jeremy Corbell Issues UFO Warning: Release Reverse-Engineering and Non-Human Biologics Files — or I Will
articles.summary: By Samuel López | USA Herald The war over government UFO secrecy may be entering its most explosive phase yet. Investigative filmmaker Jeremy Corbell has issued what many are interpreting as a direct challenge to the U. government: either begin disclosing what officials know about alleged UFO crash retrieval programs, reverse-engineering efforts, and non-human biologics—or Jeremy Corbell warns he may release hundreds of UFO files if the government fails to address reverse engineering, non-human craft, and biologics claims.

en.title: Jeremy Corbell Issues UFO Warning: Release Reverse-Engineering and Non-Human Biologics Files — or I Will
en.summary: By Samuel López | USA Herald The war over government UFO secrecy may be entering its most explosive phase yet. Investigative filmmaker Jeremy Corbell has issued what many are interpreting as a direct challenge to the U. government: either begin disclosing what officials know about alleged UFO crash retrieval programs, reverse-engineering efforts, and non-human biologics—or Jeremy Corbell warns he may release hundreds of UFO files if the government fails to address reverse engineering, non-human craft, and biologics claims.

de.title: Jeremy Corbell gibt UFO-Warnung heraus: Veröffentlichung von Reverse-Engineering- und nicht-humanen Biologika-Dateien – oder ich werde es tun
de.summary: Von Samuel López | USA Herald Der Krieg um die UFO-Geheimhaltung der Regierung könnte in seine bisher explosivste Phase eintreten. Der investigative Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell hat herausgebracht, was viele als direkte Herausforderung an die US-Regierung interpretieren: Entweder er beginnt mit der Offenlegung dessen, was die Beamten über angebliche UFO-Absturz-Bergungsprogramme, Reverse-Engineering-Bemühungen und nichtmenschliche Biologika wissen – oder Jeremy Corbell warnt davor, dass er Hunderte von UFO-Dateien veröffentlichen könnte, wenn die Regierung es versäumt, auf Reverse Engineering, nichtmenschliche Kunsthandwerk und Biologika-Behauptungen einzugehen.

articles.title: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion
articles.summary: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion Posted Jun 12, 2026 08:01:58 AM. LOS ANGELES (AP) — In “Disclosure Day,” out Friday, Steven Spielberg is once again inviting audiences to ponder the existence of extraterrestrial life — and the implications it would have for religion on Earth. But Spielberg is hardly the only one making headlines of late about UFOs and the possibility of life on other planets. What was once considered fringe or conspiratorial has in recent months popped up everywhere from the White House to the Catholic Church, as public fascination with unidentified anomalous phenomena — or UAPs, as the government calls them — becomes more mainstream.
